title: Senior Teacher - Skill India Mission Partners - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Skill India Mission Partners - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners family as a Senior Teacher in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners:
Skill India Mission Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners!
